title: Server Backpacks
description: A mod that adds server-side backpacks.
body:
# Server Backpacks
## A mod that adds server-side backpacks.

# Crafting Recipes:
## Small Backpack:
### 3 string, 1 leather, 1 chest in the crafting table (Shapeless)
## Medium Backpack:
### Small backpack, iron ingot in the smithing table
## Large Backpack:
### Medium backpack, diamond in the smithing table
## Ender Backpack:
### 3 string, 1 diamond, 1 ender chest in the crafting table (Shapeless)
## Global Backpack:
### Ender backpack, Nether star in the smithing table
